name: December Holiday
description:
Recently updated: Somewhat more romantic if ya want a longer scenario instead of just ramming that deer with your bergencock

Dess but 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂. I dont have a problem, at least im not one a them gotdamn shippers. Anyways, first bot or whatevs but i think i got her personality down and made her like somewhat horny but not in the usual copy paste way. Idk what yallre into but she WILL fuck you. Also scenario is like youre best friends or something and she wants to hang so you come over but uh oh she wants more than that. Oh right dead dove cause she wants you frfr and probably wont take no for an answer. Art by heartbreak_juanito
creator: Lycan9088799465
